七、完形填空
It was Sunday yesterday. Lily __1__ up early and went to the park with her parents. They __2__ many flowers there. Lily was very __3__.

1. A. get B. gets C. got D. getting
2. A. see B. saw C. sees D. seeing
3. A. happy B. happily C. sad D. sadly
答案及解析
1. C 解析：yesterday 表示过去时。
2. B 解析：全文为过去时。
3. A 解析：be 动词后接形容词。
